title: Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke moves Delhi High Court against blocking of X account
description: Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke has approached the Delhi High Court challenging the blocking of the CJP's X account. Dipke has challenged the government’s blocking order, which cited national security reasons to ban the handle.The petition, filed through Advocate Nakul Gandhi of NG Law Chambers, is likely to be heard this week. According to a report by The Indian Express, the Central government ordered the blocking of the X account of CJP in the wake of inputs from the Intelli
